name: No- Fat Banana - Split Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Snack Wells fat-free Cinnamon Snacks
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Combine all crust ingredients in a bowl.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of an 8-inch pie pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 4-5 minutes.
Filling:
1. Layer the filling ingredients in the prepared crust, following the order listed above.
2. Refrigerate until serving.
